body: ran the Battery loop this morning and literally almost tripped over a tourist taking a sunrise pic lmao, karma for skipping it last week i guess 😅
omg are you ok??? also that's what you get for sleeping in monday
fine fine, ego bruised more than anything. also margaux wants to do a whole soft shell crab special for the weekend covers, so prep is gonna be INSANE tmrw
ok so i'm not waiting up lol, grab me one of those crabs tho
Mom the Battery run this morning was actually perfect, weather finally broke. Did 3 miles no problem 🙌
Mijo! I was thinking about you! How's Willa? You eating enough before your shifts?
She's good, yeah. Margaux had us do family meal before service Tuesday and I made your arroz con pollo. Entire kitchen went quiet in a good way lol
Oh Daniel!! That makes me so happy. Call me after Saturday? Love you mijo ❤️
Hey mijo, your tía Carmen is visiting from Bogotá next Monday. You think you can get a night off Linden & Rye or is Margaux going to have you slammed?
Mondays are my day off actually so perfect timing. Been a minute since I've seen tía, bring her to that new spot on King St I told you about
Your mother already started cooking. You know how she gets, tía walks in the door and Rosa's got the whole stove going lol
Ha that tracks. Tell mamá to save me some of whatever she's making, I'll eat before I come over so I'm not hovering like a hawk the second I walk in 😂
hey can you get me and two friends a table at L&R saturday night? coming down from columbia. told mom we'd do brunch sunday too but i need the fancy dinner first lol
saturday is 80 covers and margaux's running a tasting menu — i'm gonna be on the line all night. but i'll text the floor manager, no promises on timing tho
i don't need you to come wave at me from the pass i just need a table 😂 also mom said call her back, she texted ME because you're not answering
i was on my run!! battery loop, headphones in, she always does this. calling her now. table's handled btw, 7:30

just pulled up tuesday's covers on my run — we've got a 12-top at 7 with two shellfish allergies and nobody flagged the bisque. gonna need to pull that off the prix fixe or we're gonna have a bad night.
caught it this morning, already swapped them to the mushroom velouté. you're literally on your day off, go enjoy the battery loop lol
loop's done already. just know how that table turns when we miss an allergy flag, not tryna repeat march 😅 velouté's the right call tho
trust me i remember march. see you at 2:30 tuesday, go eat something and leave me alone 😂
yo what about The Tattooed Moose this week? haven't been since they redid the duck club
nah last time their fry oil was way past it, tasted like Tuesday's sins. what about Craft Conundrum? been meaning to try their new tap list
lmaooo 'tuesday's sins' bro you ruin every spot for me. fine Craft Conundrum works, 8ish? you off monday?
monday's my only day that exists so yeah 8 works. just gotta do my Battery loop first or i'm useless company
Carlos heads up — Margaux just added a roasted beet salad to Tuesday's menu, last minute surprise. gonna need two cases of chioggia, can you get that to Linden & Rye by 2pm tomorrow?
Chioggia's tight this week, one case is all I've got confirmed. Can do golden beets to fill the second — same farm, came in Friday, gorgeous. That work?
golden actually works better, Margaux'll love the color contrast on the plate. one chioggia one golden, 2pm Tuesday. you're saving my prep list man
Done, I'll shoot you a text when it's loaded on the truck. Tell Margaux I said hi 😄
Hey Daniel — lab work came back. LDL's borderline high again. Nothing urgent but worth a quick chat. Any chance you can come in before the week gets away from you?
Ugh, knew it. Tuesday through Saturday I'm basically taste-testing butter for a living so that tracks 😅 Monday morning's my off day — 9am work? I'll be back from my Battery run by then.
9am Monday is perfect. Want to talk through the sleep side too — last visit you mentioned not getting to bed before 1am most nights. Long-term that compounds the cholesterol stuff.
Yeah Margaux's been adding late tasting menus so it's been rough. I'll bring the last 3 weeks of sleep data from my watch. See you Monday doc.
hey Kim it's Daniel — gotta reschedule Thursday's cleaning, Margaux just added a private buyout that night and I'm the only one who can run the fish station 😬
No problem! How's next Monday morning work? Like 9am?
Monday's actually perfect — I do my Battery run first thing but I'm always back by 8:30
Great, locking you in for 9. Brush before you come in this time chef 😄

Hey Brian — exhaust fan above my stove just rattles now, been dead since Thursday. Happy to ignore a lot but I cook for a living and Willa's already giving me grief about the smoke lol. Can you get someone in this week?
Hey Daniel, yeah let's get that fixed. I can have my guy swing by Wednesday or Thursday morning — which works?
Thursday. Wednesday I've got my morning run then straight into mise en place review at Linden & Rye by 2:30, it'd be tight. Anytime before noon Thursday is perfect.
Done — I'll send Marcus, he'll text you when he's headed over. Shouldn't take long.
yo you still doing that Battery loop wednesday mornings? been trying to get back into running and figured 3 miles isn't gonna kill me
dude yes, 7am, starts at White Point Garden. fair warning i move fast and i'm mid-podcast the whole time lol — you cool just vibing?
lmaooo yeah i'll bring headphones. you eating after or heading straight to Linden & Rye?
shift doesn't start til 2:30 so yeah we can grab something. Willa's been on me about that new place on King anyway, two birds 🤙
ok margaux just sent me SEVEN revision notes on the summer menu layout. at 11pm. does she do this to you too or am i special 😭
lmaooo welcome to my life. she once 86'd a whole dish at 6:45 on a friday. just — gone. font notes are gentler than that trust me
how do you even work with her?? she wants the typeface bigger AND smaller in the same note i'm pretty sure
she's the best chef in charleston so you just breathe and fix it. the food makes the chaos worth it. also call her Chef Tillman when you reply, she cares about that
yo did you see Bon Appétit finally did a whole spread on Charleston lowcountry? they name-dropped like three spots and somehow not Linden & Rye lol
i KNOW margaux was so salty about it during briefing yesterday, she kept slamming sheet pans 😂 we're right there doing the actual work
okay but like the shrimp perloo you guys ran last tuesday tho?? if that's not feature-worthy i don't know what is
that one was all me btw. told margaux, she nodded, moved on. classic 🙃 someday priya, someday
yo chef the shallots we got from the sysco delivery smell off to me, like half the case is soft. want me to grab some from compare foods on king before 2:30?
yeah toss anything that gives when you squeeze it. grab 3 lbs from compare, tell them it's for linden & rye and they'll sort you out. i'll hit margaux before briefing
on it. should i log the sysco case as a return or just trash it?
log it, i'll deal with the credit. don't touch the rest of the veg until i'm in, i wanna check the whole delivery before we start mise
yo did you catch margaux's face when the 8-top ordered everything medium-well 😭 i thought she was gonna pull the whole menu
bro i was watching from the host stand i literally had to turn around. she held it together though respect
barely lol. she sent me three tickets in a row after that like therapy. hey you going to beers with danny tomorrow night?
yeah willa's meeting us too if that's cool? danny said he found some spot on upper king he's been hyping for weeks
Dan — got beautiful triggerfish in this morning, first clean run in like two weeks. Maybe 6 lbs left after the morning crowd. Think Margaux wants any for tonight's service?
hold all of it lol yes. what's your price rn
12/lb, delivered by 1 if you need it. been on ice since 5am, skin's still iridescent. you'll want to see it.
done, text when you're pulling up to Linden. gonna pitch it to Margaux as the special, she'll either love me or kill me 😂
yo Jake still need that andouille quote for next week — Margaux wants to do a low country boil feature and I need numbers before Thursday service 🙏
On it. Trinity Farms has 40lbs available at $8.20/lb, can have it at Linden & Rye by Tuesday AM
that works, can you throw in a case of the smoked tasso too? Danny and I were at Rodney Scott's last night and now I'm in my head about smoke profiles lol
Already on the invoice. I'll email it tonight, just confirm by noon tomorrow
Hey — Marion Square market coordinator finally got back to me. Wednesday vendor slot opens in August but the app deadline's July 15. Worth a look or too tight with your schedule?
oh damn yes worth a look. 60 covers tonight plus a private party so I'm in the weeds til close but I'll hit you after my Monday run, like 9am
lol don't ghost me like you did on that Firefly popup 😂 Margaux running you ragged over there huh
that was ONE time and she had me breaking down whole loins til midnight ok. 9am Monday, I promise, on my life

Hey Daniel — still got you down for the Lowcountry Harvest walkthrough on the 12th? Need headcount for tent setup by EOD. Margaux confirmed Linden & Rye has a slot but wanted to make sure you're still the one running it.
Yeah still me. What time does the tent open? Margaux wants us loaded in by 10 but I need to know if that actually works with your crew's setup.
Load-in's 8am, tent opens noon. You've got the 1:30 slot — 30 min. Putting you right next to the oyster counter so expect a crowd 👀
Perfect. I'll build something around the she-crab bisque we've been dialing in at L&R. Just tell your volunteers not to touch my mise en place this time 😂
terri you catch that wild fermentation panel at the market saturday? willa dragged me out before service and honestly worth it — that miso aging talk was 🔥
omg yes the guy from savannah with the 3-year barley miso!! did you taste the batch
didn't even hesitate. margaux would lowkey kill for that depth on our charcuterie board. already texting her about sourcing locally
lol sneak it into the tuesday tasting and see if she notices 👀 i have a contact at sweetgrass ferments if you want an intro
